title: MCA Extends Companies Compliance Facilitation Scheme (CCFS-2026) till August 31, 2026
content:
# MCA Extends Companies Compliance Facilitation Scheme (CCFS-2026) till August 31, 2026

Ek important update hai. Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) ne Companies Compliance Facilitation Scheme, 2026 (CCFS-2026) ki validity ko extend kar diya hai, jisse companies ko pending statutory filings complete karne ke liye aur time mil gaya hai.

Yeh extension General Circular No. 03/2026 ke through announce kiya gaya hai, dated July 8, 2026.

*   **Old Due Date:** This scheme was previously set to expire on July 15, 2026.
*   **New Due Date:** Ab companies August 31, 2026 tak apni pending filings complete kar sakti hain under CCFS-2026.
*   **Reason for Extension:** Yeh decision data centre mein June 5, 2026 ko hue fire incident ke baad, ongoing capacity enhancement aur restoration activities ko dekhte hue liya gaya hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.mca.gov.in/bin/dms/getdocument?mds=xwGPm7oa6c44FD0N2foavA%253D%253D&type=open)

*Published on: 8 July 2026*
